prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第73名（2025年第67名 ），排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强理工类院校，石油石化领域特色鲜明；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音平台综合热度未进入前106名， 关注度一般，未见异常报考信号；石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势学科（第四轮学科评估A+和A-），化学工程与技术、安全科学与工程等也 具备较强实力，与该校石油石化主干专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业持续高热，石油工程、化工类等传统工科热度 平稳；河北省2026年物理类考生约36.5万人（按近年比例估算），较2025年（36.3万）略有增加，整体竞争环境趋紧。；该校位于 山东省青岛市，在河北省属外省招生，无本省倾斜；2025年该校在河北省总招生占比约3.01%（18人/598人总计划），属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次27821名、2026年扩招11人（扩幅3.8%）、物理类考生略增及学校排名小幅下滑等因素；结合考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧，预测2026 年最低位次约28635名，区间28135–29135名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 33361 → 23984 → 57829 → 33476 → 27821. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (57829), but it quickly recovered to 33476 in 2024 and further advanced to 27821 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend over the past two years, with a cumulative advance of about 5555 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 27821. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 273 in 2021, 278 in 2022, 291 in 2023, 278 in 2024, and 289 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 300, an increase of 11 from 2025, an expansion of about 3.8%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (67th in 2025), a slight decline but still among the top 100 national science and engineering institutions, with distinctive features in the petroleum and petrochemical fields. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in recent reputation monitoring. The comprehensive popularity on Douyin platform has not entered the top 106, with average attention and no abnormal application signals. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional advantageous disciplines (A+ and A- in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), and Chemical Engineering and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering, etc., also have strong strength, highly corresponding to the university's main petroleum and petrochemical majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, while traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province is approximately 365,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase from 2025 (363,000), leading to a tighter overall competitive environment. The university is located in Qingdao City, Shandong Province, and recruits from outside Hebei Province, with no provincial preference. In 2025, the university's total enrollment proportion in Hebei Province was about 3.01% (18 out of 598 total places), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 27821, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 11 (3.8% expansion), a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, and a minor decline in the university's ranking, combined with intensified competition due to the larger examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 28635, with a range of 28135–29135.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 28635, with a range of 28135–29135. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (28135) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. Candidates with rankings near the middle of the range (around 28600) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 characteristic majors such as Petroleum Engineering Elite Class and New Energy, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (29135) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. The university's flagship petroleum and petrochemical majors (Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation) have an A+ discipline evaluation and high industry recognition, suitable for candidates aspiring to the energy field.
